Video.summary: Jacoby isn’t so happy about Amber’s business success and called off the wedding. A compatibility test decides their future.
Video.title: Rouzan vs Lunkins

Video.summary: Shaylen petitions her boyfriend, Quan, to take a polygraph test because she suspects he's cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Hudson

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating mixed with short tempers is a recipe for disaster in D’Mitry and Jessica’s relationship.
Video.title: Hartfield vs. Saunders

Video.summary: A boyfriend and girlfriend go head-to-head in court over a discarded promise ring and a broken camera.
Video.title: White vs. Mitchell

Video.summary: Destiny is suing ex-roomate Bisa for unpaid rent. Bisa is counter suing for moving fees and mental anguish.
Video.title: Too Close for Comfort

Video.summary: A Georgia woman suspects her longtime boyfriend of cheating because he has not yet proposed.
Video.title: Harris vs. Harris

Video.summary: After an incident involving the police and damage to her car, LaShawn grapples with her ex-boyfriend Mario's militant personality.
Video.title: Brown vs. Monk

Video.summary: Past infidelity has a girlfriend and boyfriend at odds over the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Ogletree vs. Lockhart

Video.summary: Daryl is suing his ex-friend for missing belongings that he believes were sold to fuel a gambling addiction.
Video.title: Gambling the Friendship

Video.summary: Nigel says that he got ripped off. Now he wants his money back from producer Daunte.
Video.title: Beating the Bank

Video.summary: They were old time band buddies that had a rockin new idea, then they say an old band buddy lured them in with a sweet song, but when his tune fell flat, they fell between a Rock N' Roll and a hard place.
Video.title: Band Buddy Battle!

Video.summary: Erica is bringing Isaiah to court under allegations of stealing money intended for medical purposes to rent a party bus.
Video.title: Hendrickson vs. Bennett

Video.summary: Eric is ready to marry Mazii, but she doesn't trust him; the Cutlers help them through their trust and communication issues.
Video.title: Monét vs. Martin

Video.summary: An exhausted mother gets a surprise after putting her dreams on hold for her family.
Video.title: Prince vs. Thornton

Video.summary: Pablo’s got jokes, but Joanna isn’t laughing. They bring their issues to the Cutlers for help saving their marriage.
Video.title: Aleman vs Aleman

Video.summary: Jasmine and Drayson are suing each other over a security deposit due a flea infestation.
Video.title: Welcome to the Flea Circus

Video.summary: Mikaela is suing her hair dresser after she left mid-service for a DUI class, and now her hair is falling out.
Video.title: When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry

Image.alt: When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry
When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry
When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry

Video.summary: Joshua demands the return of an engagement ring after Eldrick ends their relationship in a viral livestream.
Video.title: Burroughs vs. Steele

Video.summary: WENET plans and executes a large Methamphetamine cartel raid.
Video.title: Mexican Cartel Meth House

Video.summary: A troubled 15-year-old boy goes through the booking process.
Video.title: Scared Straight? We Hope So!

Video.summary: Deputy Payne shows us a typical day for the life of a deputy in El Dorado County.
Video.title: All in A Night's Patrol

Video.summary: SWAT carries out a mission to arrest a man wanted for assault with a deadly weapon.
Video.title: SWAT vs. Dirty Harry

Video.summary: A couple get into an argument after Deputy Katz makes a felony arrest. Deputy Dacanay responds to a man attempting to break into a neighbor's home with a shovel.
Video.title: Unhappy Wife, Unhappy Life

Video.summary: Deputy Carpenter investigates a marijuana grow and home theft. Deputy Bradley responds to an abusive alcoholic mother.
Video.title: Follow the Water

Video.summary: Deputies Payne and Miller apprehend a burglar under the influence at an animal hospital. The SED conducts a probation check on a known flop house.
Video.title: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Image.alt: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Video.summary: A dangerous fugitive is wanted for assult and battery. A deputy stops and unregistrered vehicle. A look at the daily procedures deputies must follow before going on patrol.
Video.title: The Man in the Van

Video.summary: Deputy Braafladt evacuates homeowners during the Sand Fire.
Video.title: Fire is Coming, Time to Run!

Image.alt: Fire is Coming, Time to Run!
Fire is Coming, Time to Run!
Fire is Coming, Time to Run!

Video.summary: Deputy Brady searches for a man wanted for felonious assault and domestic violence.
Video.title: You Can Run but You Can Not Hide

Image.alt: You Can Run but You Can Not Hide
You Can Run but You Can Not Hide
You Can Run but You Can Not Hide

Video.summary: Kent loaned Elizabath five grand to help pay for her dental work but is now asking for it back.
Video.title: Love Bites

Video.summary: Pablo and Stepanie's relationship was all about the sex. But her change in hormones made him moan.
Video.title: Turning Her Freak Off

Video.summary: Arleen says she generously helped her ex pay his rent, get around town, and that she kept him looking good. Marcus denies it all, claiming her paid all the rent and never took a dime from her.
Video.title: We Can't Make Up Until You Pay for the Makeup!

Image.alt: We Can't Make Up Until You Pay for the Makeup!
We Can't Make Up Until You Pay for the Makeup!
We Can't Make Up Until You Pay for the Makeup!

Video.summary: Parole Agents are extra careful while finding a gang member. A parolee tries to hide his weapon from agents.
Video.title: Armed and Dangerous

Video.summary: Agents can't find a parolee at his house but find contraband. Agents discover a woman with a warrant hiding.
Video.title: Finding Contraband

Video.summary: A home visit leads to massive amounts of contraband and a manhunt. A Nevada man avoids his parole officer.
Video.title: The Plot Thickens

Video.summary: A parolee tries to hide drugs under his bedridden girlfriend. A parolee family watches his arrest.
Video.title: Hidden Stashes

Video.summary: Parole agents apprehend a predator a pregnant woman and a second striker with a rap sheet.
Video.title: The Good The Bad and the Ugly

Image.alt: The Good The Bad and the Ugly
The Good The Bad and the Ugly
The Good The Bad and the Ugly

Video.summary: James has not paid Carlita for restoring an antique stove because he feels he was coerced into the repairs.
Video.title: Antique Repair Uproar

Video.summary: Rachel is suing her landlord because she claims he forced her to lose her job.
Video.title: My Landlord Got Me Fired

Video.summary: Darral has been sued after towing Chester's car who he believes was carelessly double parked illegally.
Video.title: Towing Tussle

Video.summary: Thomas Villani says he hired the defendant, Frank Colluci, to move his furniture and in the process, he broke a pane of glass in his Tommy Bahama curio cabinet. First he said he’d fix it, then he said he’d hire someone to fix it, and now, here they are, because he’s done nothing. Thomas is suing for $5,000, the cost of the cabinet. Frank says he is ready, willing, and able to fix it, but the plaintiff never allows him to install the replacement piece. He’s accused of causing the customer some pain.
Video.title: Causing Some Pain

Video.summary: Crystal sues her ex-friend Claudia for $800, claiming she used her cruise payment for another guest after Crystal canceled due to her son’s accident. Claudia countersues for $1,000, alleging harassment and car damage.
Video.title: Cruise Catastrophe

Video.summary: Lynn believes his wife was cheating on him in their relationship, now he's here to be paid back for a loan.
Video.title: Fuming Over a Mobile Home

Video.summary: Trying to regain custody of her children, Shamika wants to prove her ex is the father of her youngest child.
Video.title: Plaintiff’s Paternity Petition

Video.summary: A woman sues her father, who she says was a great role model who was always there for her, for unpaid rent.
Video.title: Love vs Lease

Video.summary: Sara is suing her ex-boyfriend for breach of contract after he let his female friend move in with him.
Video.title: Stripped Bare

Video.summary: Terry is suing his ex-wife because he lent her money for their daughter (18) to have surgery on her jaw.
Video.title: A Host of Issues

Video.summary: A woman hired her friend of 15 years to do her son's and husband's tax returns, but says the friend failed to complete them, so she's suing for a refund.
Video.title: H&R Best Friend

Video.summary: Jada is suing her mother for $4,000 in unreturned property after kicking her out of the house.
Video.title: Smart Mouth and Bad Attitude
